name: No Frost Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut up 1 cup of dates.
2. Add the dates to a blender and mix with 1 cup boiling water and baking soda.
3. Cream together 1 cup sugar and butter.
4. Gradually add the date mixture and flour to the creamed sugar and butter.
5. Incorporate eggs, cocoa, vanilla, salt, and 3/4 cup chocolate chips into the mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a 9x13-inch baking pan.
7. Sprinkle the remaining sugar and chocolate chips on top of the batter.
8. Optionally sprinkle chopped nuts on top.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
Serves about 15.
The Workbasket, 1977, Reader Recipes, submitted by Karen Venables
